_comment: Non-secret defaults for the Copilot Studio SDK (Direct-to-Engine) connection mode. These IDs are sent to the browser anyway, so they are safe to commit. Environment variables of the same name (ENTRA_CLIENT_ID, ENTRA_TENANT_ID, COPILOT_ENVIRONMENT_ID, COPILOT_SCHEMA_NAME, COPILOT_AGENT_CLOUD) override these values when set.
